full_text:
Cheng Cun 成存
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Cun (成存)was born in Guanghan. Administrator of the new region Jiangyang in 203. Cheng Cun was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
